advanced/patterns.title: Patterns
advanced/patterns.description: Advanced composition patterns for building complex state machine systems with Flow.

advanced/serialization.title: Serialization
advanced/serialization.description: Flow provides built-in serialization support for persisting and restoring machine state. This is useful for saving user sessions, server-side rendering, or crash recovery.

advanced/tracing.title: Tracing
advanced/tracing.description: Flow provides a tracing system for recording and analyzing state machine transitions. This is used by the DevTools integration and can be used for debugging, performance monitoring, and audit trails.

api/api-reference.title: API Reference
api/api-reference.description: Complete API reference for @hex-di/flow organized by category.

concepts/activities.title: Activities
concepts/activities.description: Activities are long-running processes that can emit events, be cancelled, and maintain their own lifecycle alongside state machines.

concepts/effects.title: Effects
concepts/effects.description: Effects in Flow are data descriptors that represent side effects to be executed. They are pure data structures, not imperative actions, making them testable, serializable, and composable.

concepts/states-events.title: States & Events
concepts/states-events.description: Flow uses branded types to provide compile-time safety and full type inference for states and events.

concepts/transitions.title: Transitions
concepts/transitions.description: Transitions define how your machine moves between states in response to events. Flow provides rich configuration options for transitions including guards, actions, effects, and validation.

guides/building-machines.title: Building Machines
guides/building-machines.description: Flow provides two approaches for building state machines: the declarative defineMachine() function and the fluent createMachineBuilder() API. Both produce the same result with full type inference.

guides/di-integration.title: DI Integration
guides/di-integration.description: Flow integrates seamlessly with the HexDI container system through adapters, enabling dependency injection for effects, activities, and cross-machine communication.

guides/running-machines.title: Running Machines
guides/running-machines.description: Once you've built a state machine, you need to create a runner to execute it. The MachineRunner manages state transitions, effect execution, activity lifecycle, and event processing.

index.title: Introduction
index.description: Type-safe state machines for TypeScript with statecharts, compile-time validated transitions, guards, effects, and HexDI integration.

react.title: React Integration
react.description: The @hex-di/flow-react package provides type-safe React hooks for Flow state machines with concurrent mode support and automatic subscription management.

testing.title: Testing
testing.description: The @hex-di/flow-testing package provides comprehensive utilities for testing state machines, including test harnesses, mock executors, assertions, and deterministic time control.
